title: Unique Party 72249 - Disney Baby Shower Invitations, Pack of 6
features: Pack of 6 Party Invitations and Envelopes from the Disney Baby Shower range
Disney Baby Shower Invites measure 11cm x 9cm (4.5" x 3.5") and come with 6 envelopes
Fabulous for spreading the word about a baby shower, 1st birthday party, Christening party or Disney party
Party invites have space on the inside to add your event name, location, date, time and RSVP information
Coordinate with other Disney Baby Shower party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Let everyone know a celebration for the mum-to-be is in the planning with these Disney Baby Shower Invitations. With Mrs. Jumbo showing motherly love to the ever charming Dumbo, these party invitations are a delightful way to give guests all of the details about an up-coming baby sprinkle, neutral baby shower, or even a first birthday party or Disney birthday party. Simply write the date, time, location, and other event info inside the card, before sealing inside the included envelopes. Box Contains 6 x Disney BABY SHOWER Die-Cut Invitations and Envelopes
